blocks.title: DeterministicFollowUps
rows: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the multi-page form functionality.

resultPayload.note: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.

evidence.error: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
evidence.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to confirm the requirement of 'multi-page forms with progress saving.' However, the linked use case does mention that a patient can complete 80% of the form and return later, which implies progress saving. Yet, there is no explicit evidence provided that confirms the implementation of multi-page forms. This lack of concrete evidence leads to a gap in meeting the requirement.
gaps: No explicit confirmation of multi-page form implementation.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the multi-page form functionality.
